title: Etsy Revenue 2013-2026
text: Historical analysis of Etsy's revenue trends from 2013 to 2026 shows significant growth and recent maturation. Etsy's annual revenue grew from approximately $196 million in 2013 to $2.81 billion in full-year 2024, representing approximately 14x growth over the period. The company achieved compound annual growth rates of approximately 17% during 2013-2024. In 2025, Etsy reported consolidated revenue of $678 million for Q4 and full-year 2025 revenue grew 6.1% to record levels. Q1 2026 revenue reached $631.3 million, up 3.1% year-over-year. The revenue growth has been supplemented by strong services revenue growth, particularly from high-margin advertising. In recent quarters, services revenue has grown at double-digit rates (10.5% in Q1 2026), outpacing core marketplace revenue growth. This shift toward services represents Etsy's strategic pivot toward higher-margin revenue streams. The company's consolidated adjusted EBITDA margin has remained resilient, typically in the 25-30% range despite marketplace GMS challenges.
